title: Varen (David) — Drow Wizard
bodyText:
Drow wizard fleeing Lolth's city with **Eilistraee's** help — living deliberately, seeing the world before the mark takes him. His **Spot** is public to the party since S08; the horned hunter is dead by his hand (S13 — he dismembered it with the shadow sword after his **divine magic rewrote time itself** to save Felson).

# What the table knows
- **Kena shares his affliction and his goddess** (S15): Lolth cursed Eilistraee's chosen to track them; the Eight Legs hunt them; Kena escaped by amputation.
- The orb/caged lady still guides him: *"Help your friend. Help find him. Bring him back."*
- New hunters incoming (S24 prep): two Drow Rogues + a **Drow Stalker** already ahead of the party — and Eilistraee *answered* at the marked wall: distant singing, the Spot warming like a held hand, the scratched spider cracking from within.

> [!dm] Where did burn-the-past divine intervention come from? (The S13 rewind read as Eilistraee.) The Spot mechanics: vitality-casting doubles cost into HP and grows the mark. David still wants the **earned theatrical death** — S24's reflection (the Spot covering half his body, smiling) is aimed straight at it. Coded journal remains stealable.
